meaning: n.(居住在菲律宾吕宋岛和棉兰老岛的)塔加路族人[语]
examples: This means that Tagalog is every bit as valid and valuable as English.
With another roll of the cosmological dice the world's language would be Tagalog.
One sign said, 'Gusto Namin Hustisya,' or 'We want justice' in Tagalog, the Philippine language.
This would allow, say, a Filipino family in Los Angeles to watch a movie in Tagalog.
For many, hearing mass in Portuguese or Tagalog was a moment of calm in a grinding existence.
